chat_messages.text: can you re format this as a description for an invoice. give me a few options: **Gate Repair-add (2) roller wheel to top, Gate Repair - gate combo lock/latchGate Repair - add (2) wheels to bottom, Gate Repair - add (1) 20ft Square tube support (to straighten the bottom)**

3. Gate Repair - add (2) wheels to bottom

I should provide a few different formatting options for how these could appear on an invoice, making them clear and professional.Here are several formatting options for your invoice descriptions:

- Gate Repair: Installation of (2) wheels - bottom section  
- Gate Repair: Installation of (1) 20ft square tube support for bottom straightening

**Option 2: Grouped by Category**
- Gate Hardware Installation: (2) top roller wheels, (2) bottom wheels
- Gate Security Repair: Combination lock/latch service
- Gate Structural Repair: 20ft square tube support installation for bottom alignment

- Gate combination lock/latch repair
- Bottom wheel installation (qty: 2)

- Install two (2) wheels to gate bottom section
- Install 20-foot square tube support to straighten bottom frame

Which style works best for your invoicing needs?
lets make these sub categroies for the main item breakdown
